meta_description: Learn how to Claude Code skills setup and overcome no portfolio. A Intermediate-level Comparison using Antigravity and Claude Code.

content.seo_title: For Founders: Claude Code Skills Setup to Solve No Portfolio
content.seo_description: Learn how to Claude Code skills setup and overcome no portfolio. A Intermediate-level Comparison using Antigravity and Claude Code for SaaS founders.
content.answer_block: To solve the 'no portfolio' trap, you must leverage Claude Code to build high-velocity, production-grade micro-SaaS MVPs. By integrating Antigravity for architectural scaffolding, you can transform abstract ideas into deployable codebases in hours, not weeks, providing tangible proof of your technical execution capability to future stakeholders and investors.
content.intro:
The silence of a blank GitHub profile is the loudest obstacle a founder faces. Clients and investors don't care about your potential; they care about the artifact—the working, breathing application that solves a real-world pain point. You are currently trapped in the 'no portfolio' purgatory where opportunity remains locked behind the door of unproven execution.

But the game has changed. With the emergence of Claude Code and high-level orchestration tools like Antigravity, the barrier to entry has collapsed. We aren't just writing code anymore; we are architecting outcomes. By setting up a robust development workflow, you can bridge the gap between 'idea' and 'shipped' faster than your competitors can set up their environments.

steps.title: Environment Initialization
steps.description: Establish a professional monorepo structure that allows for rapid iteration and modular component testing.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Initialize a production-ready Next.js 15 project with Tailwind CSS, Shadcn UI, and Supabase integration. Include a clean directory structure for API routes and server actions.

steps.title: Database Schema Design
steps.description: Define your data models to ensure your MVP supports monetization from day one.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate a Prisma schema for a subscription-based SaaS. Include tables for users, profiles, subscription_plans, and usage_metrics with proper indexing.

steps.title: Core Feature Engineering
steps.description: Build the primary value proposition of your product using iterative AI-assisted coding cycles.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Build a secure authentication flow using Clerk and create a dashboard component that fetches user-specific usage data from the Supabase client.
steps.claude_code_command: claude /sub 'implement user dashboard and auth guard'

steps.title: API & Logic Layer
steps.description: Connect your frontend to backend services to ensure data flow and functional integrity.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create a secure API route for handling Stripe webhook events and update user subscription status in the database accordingly.
steps.claude_code_command: claude /sub 'create stripe webhook handler and logic'

steps.title: Deployment & Documentation
steps.description: Prepare your code for production and generate the documentation required to showcase the project.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate a comprehensive README.md file highlighting the tech stack, architecture decisions, and instructions for running the project locally.

pro_tips: Always define your tech stack constraints in the Claude system prompt to prevent the model from suggesting outdated dependencies.
Use Antigravity to generate 'test-driven' prompts; if it isn't tested, it doesn't belong in your public-facing portfolio.
Leverage Claude Code's memory by referencing previous commit hashes to maintain architectural consistency across complex features.
Focus on shipping one high-quality, complex feature rather than five simple landing pages; quality proves technical depth.
Automate your CI/CD pipeline early; a 'Deployed' badge on your repository is worth more than a thousand lines of clean code.
content.next_steps: Once your first project is live, push the code to a public GitHub repo, write a case study on the build process, and share the link on your professional social media channels to begin building authority.
content.conversion_block: Stop waiting for the perfect moment. Your portfolio is a byproduct of your shipping velocity. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
